## recordFromEntries() function

Type-safe(ish) record constructor from an iterable of `[key, value]` tuples.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function recordFromEntries<TK extends string, TV>(entries: Iterable<[TK, TV]>): Record<TK, TV>;
```
